content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with NIFTY +1.23%, AUTO +2.32%, IT +1.60% leading. VIX cooled -5.87% to 16.99 indicating risk-on sentiment. Existing book is well-positioned with most holdings in profit. Focus today is position management — trailing SLs to lock in gains — rather than chasing extended breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1033.90,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +7.4%. Current SL 1033.90 is already above entry 984 (locked +5%). HOLD existing — no MODIFY needed since values unchanged. Actually, let me skip — emit HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge at -2.0%. SL 119 still appropriate (~3% below CMP). Gold consolidating after 38% YoY rally; thesis of safe-haven hedge intact. Hold and let SL do its job."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "new_target": 1485.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Skip — current SL already at 1438 (above entry 1412.94, locking gain). No change needed. Will emit HOLD instead in position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.7% only, P&L not yet at +2% threshold for breakeven trail. Q4 results May 15 catalyst ahead. Current SL 402 (~1.3% below CMP) appropriate. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.4%, below +2% trail threshold. Current SL 1742 already above entry 1734 (small lock). Organon acquisition added leverage/integration risk but stock holding up. Volume surge 5.3x mixed signal. Hold with current SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,
      "new_target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Skip MODIFY — values unchanged. Position +0.3%, no trail trigger. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +3.1% (CMP 483.70 vs entry 469). Per trail mandate at +2%, SL should be at/above breakeven. Current SL 471 is already above entry. Tighten further to 475 to lock minimum +1.3% gain. Also raise target to 495 — stock has broken above prior 52w high (476) on Q4 strength + e-auction premium expansion thesis; original 488 too close. R:R remains favorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.9%, below trail threshold. Cum-dividend final session today (Rs 11/share record date Apr 30). Sell-the-news risk after Q4 beat. SL 605 (~1.8% below CMP) appropriate. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +9.43% intraday to fresh 52w high after Q4 beat. Already extended; chasing here is poor R:R. Banking sector ECL framework overhang. Wait for pullback to VWAP/175-180 zone."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +6.8% to fresh 52w high. Already hold COALINDIA + NTPC + POWERGRID in energy/power cluster — adding ONGC would push cluster concentration too high. Skip; cluster discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RELIANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +4.15% but Q4 PAT -12.55% miss; YTD -18% laggard. Not a clean breakout. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong setup but at 13467 a meaningful position would require ~7-8 shares for 10% allocation; lot value awkward and stock already +1.85% with most of move done. Pass for now."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results today after market — binary event risk. Avoid pre-results entry. ECL framework overhang on financials."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Active SFIO probe into Rs 1,979-2,600 cr derivatives accounting fraud. Governance overhang too severe. Hard pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Duplicate guard — already covered above."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+7.4% gain. SL 1033.90 already locks ~5% above entry. Current SL is well-positioned. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, -2% drawdown within tolerance. SL 119 (~3% below CMP) holds."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1438 already above entry 1412.94, locking gains. Strong Q4 beat. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+0.7%, below +2% trail trigger. SL 402 (-1.3%) appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, below trail trigger. SL 1742 already above entry. Organon deal uncertainty — wider berth justified."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+0.3%, below trail trigger. SL 318 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "reasoning": "+3.1% gain crosses trail threshold. Tighten SL from 471 to 475 to lock minimum 1.3% gain while stock breaks to fresh highs. Target also raised to 495 in decisions."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+0.9%, below trail trigger. Cum-dividend day; expect ex-div drop tomorrow ~Rs 11. Current SL 605 has buffer for that."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BANDHANBNK: wait for pullback to 180-185 VWAP zone for swing entry. MARUTI: monitor for consolidation around 13200-13300 for cleaner R:R. ONGC: cluster constrained — would need to trim COALINDIA or NTPC first. BAJFINANCE: re-evaluate post Q4 results tonight. GRSE/CEATLTD/INTELLECT: too extended intraday, watch for next setup. CANCEL consideration for stale OPEN orders: GLENMARK (447m old), PHARMABEES (3143m / 2+ days old), TATAPOWER (3265m / 2+ days old) — these have likely seen market move past intended entry. Should review.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 50% deployed with +1.07% session P&L and +0.64% cumulative. Heavy energy/power cluster exposure (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA + HINDZINC = ~25% of book) — at cluster cap, no more energy adds. Today's discipline: trailed COALINDIA SL after breakout to 52w high. 5-day rolling stats show 14% win rate / 0.4 profit factor — concerning. Adjusting strategy: tighter SL discipline on winners (locked-in trails), no new entries on extended breakouts, focus on quality setups with clear R:R. Three stale OPEN orders (GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) are bloating the order book — should be cancelled in next cycle if still working."
}
